name: Lewis Group Limited
summary: Lewis Group Limited, a credit retailer, sells household furniture and electrical appliances in South Africa, Botswana, Lesotho, Eswatini, and Namibia. The company's stores offer home electronics; sound and vision equipment; and lounge, bedroom, and dining room furniture products under the Lewis, Best Home and Electric, United Furniture Outlets, and Beares brands. In addition, it provides short-term insurance to customers purchasing merchandise on credit. As of November 25, 2020, the company operated approximately 805 stores. Lewis Group Limited was founded in 1934 and is based in Cape Town, South Africa.
